response.justification: Candidate is a versatile full-stack engineer with strong experience in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, but the resume shows minimal Java work (limited to brief use at Altom for robotic arms/mobile tooling) and no Kotlin, Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience. The only IDE-internals exposure is ~6 months writing C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI a decade ago. The role requires deep JVM expertise and enterprise framework fluency that this background does not demonstrate.
strengths: Prior IDE component development experience (NI LabWindows/CVI)
Track record on large-scale, high-throughput systems (Sociomantic, millions of req/s)
Strong communication, teaching, and workshop/talk history
concerns: No Kotlin and only superficial Java experience; no demonstrated deep JVM knowledge
No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate exposure listed
Career trajectory centers on web/Node/DLang rather than enterprise JVM tooling

key_factors.factor: Some IDE and large-scale systems exposure
